title: New Year’s Day (Shogatsu)
summary: Japan welcomed 2026 with the traditional Shogatsu celebrations. Offices closed for the extended New Year break.

title: Coming of Age Day
summary: Seijin no Hi honored new adults turning 20, marked by ceremonies across Japan.

title: National Foundation Day
summary: Kenkoku Kinen no Hi celebrated the founding of Japan; public offices closed nationwide.

title: Emperor’s Birthday
summary: Emperor Naruhito’s birthday was observed with ceremonies at the Imperial Palace.
